scenario.name: Codeowner approves the refined plan inside the session

final_local.change_request: Add structured logging to the ingestion service so we can correlate request traces in Grafana.
final_local.intent_analysis:
Ask: feature — structured (JSON) logging across the ingestion service.
Systems/files: request/handler layer, logging utility, Grafana datasource config.
Constraints: preserve log levels; trace_id must propagate; no PII.
Codeowners: no CODEOWNERS file in repo.
Acceptance: every ingestion log line emits JSON with trace_id; Grafana filter by trace_id; tests pass.
